landing.hero_desc: A.I Do is your AI wedding planning partner — from setting a budget and building a timeline to drafting vendor emails and coordinating the big day itself.
landing.video_desc: A quick look at what A.IDO can do for your wedding.
landing.features_desc: Eight AI-powered tools designed for your wedding journey.
landing.final_desc: Start planning your perfect wedding with A.IDO. It's free to get started.
landing.footer_brand: A.I Do — AI Wedding Planning OS

features.timeline_desc: A perfect minute-by-minute schedule for your day.
features.budget_desc: Track spending and predict costs with AI.
features.checklist_desc: Month-by-month tasks tailored to your date.
features.emails_desc: Professional emails drafted by AI in seconds.
features.contracts_desc: AI reviews your vendor contracts and flags risks before you sign.
features.profile_desc: Your vision, style, and details — all in one place.
features.seating_desc: Auto-generate the perfect seating arrangement for your guests.
features.collector_desc: Share a link so guests submit their own contact info and address.
features.assistant_desc: Your AI planning companion — and emergency support when your wedding day arrives.

settings.language_desc: Sets the display language for the entire platform.
